_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=real-data witness (CHB-MIT chb10) recording the artifact-robustness result; reproduced by qa_eeg_phase_conjugate_recall.py; primary_source cites Shoeb 2009 / Goldberger 2000. -->
primary_source: (Shoeb, 2009) MIT CHB-MIT Scalp EEG Database; (Goldberger, 2000) DOI 10.1161/01.CIR.101.23.e215 PhysioNet. Real chb10 result: seizure/baseline recall well above chance, and phase-locked recall beats naive under a global reference-shift artifact.
